name: Coinbase x402
description: HTTP 402 micropayments — agents pay per request via standard headers (x-payment-…). USDC settlement on Base.

name: Stripe MPP
description: Stripe Merchant Payment Protocol — agent-initiated card and bank settlement with delegated spend limits.

name: Visa TAP
description: Visa Trusted Agent Protocol — tokenised card-present agent rails with binding signature verification.

name: BTC L1
description: Native Bitcoin base layer — threshold-ECDSA signed transactions from the Paxio Wallet canister.
